subject: Salish Sea Ecosystem Conference — abstract submission open
body_preview: Abstract submissions for the 2027 Salish Sea Ecosystem Conference are now open through January 15.

subject: PNW Marine Sciences Symposium — call for student posters
body_preview: We invite graduate students to submit posters for the spring symposium. Travel stipends available.

subject: Graduate Research Fellowship — eligibility
body_preview: Thanks for your interest. The fellowship is open to M.S. students in their second year; deadline is Dec 1.

subject: Re: Graduate Research Fellowship — eligibility
body_preview: Thank you, that's very helpful. I'll have my advisor's letter and a one-page summary ready well before Dec 1.

subject: Re: Graduate Research Fellowship — eligibility
body_preview: Sounds great. The portal opens next week; I'll forward the link once it's live.

subject: Collaboration — Site 7 swell-exposure data
body_preview: Would you be willing to share the Titlow Beach survey series? It complements our outer-coast dataset nicely.

subject: Re: Collaboration — Site 7 swell-exposure data
body_preview: Happy to — I'll share the cleaned Site 7 file once Dr. Lindström and I finalize the QA/QC pass this week.

subject: Re: Collaboration — Site 7 swell-exposure data
body_preview: Perfect. No rush — sometime in the next two weeks is fine. Thank you, Alex.

subject: Webinar: Ocean warming and rocky-shore communities
body_preview: Reminder: the warming-and-rocky-shores webinar is this Thursday at 12pm PT. Recording will be shared.

subject: Special issue invitation — student contributions
body_preview: Our special issue on climate-driven community shifts welcomes short student notes. Optional, no obligation.

subject: Seattle Aquarium — student volunteer outreach day
body_preview: We're hosting a tide-pool outreach day in November and would love grad-student volunteers. Interested?

subject: Re: Seattle Aquarium — student volunteer outreach day
body_preview: I'd love to, depending on my thesis timeline. Could you send the November date so I can check my calendar?

subject: PSIS Graduate School — enrollment certification confirmed
body_preview: Your full-time enrollment for Fall 2026 has been certified. This supports your loan deferment.

subject: WA DNR — aquatic resources internship listing
body_preview: Sharing our summer aquatic-resources internship posting in case it fits your interests post-degree.

subject: Symposium poster template + guidelines
body_preview: Attached are the poster size guidelines and the template. Posters print on-site at no cost to students.

subject: Re: Symposium poster template + guidelines
body_preview: Thank you — I'll build the poster from my December seminar figures. Aiming to submit the abstract by deadline.

subject: Postdoc methods exchange — R spatial workflow
body_preview: Elena mentioned your R spatial utilities. Would you share the repo? Happy to swap our tide-correction script.

subject: Re: Postdoc methods exchange — R spatial workflow
body_preview: Absolutely — the repo is r-spatial-utils on GitHub. I'd genuinely love your tide-correction approach.

subject: Conference travel stipend — application window
body_preview: Student travel stipend applications close December 20. Apply early; funds are limited.

subject: Department seminar schedule — Fall 2026
body_preview: The fall seminar schedule is posted. Your progress talk is confirmed for December 9 at 3pm.

subject: Webinar recording — warming and rocky shores
body_preview: As promised, here is the recording link. Slides are attached for your reference.
